changes.summary: Allow unlimited append-only observations while freezing the first daily TopK selection.
Add content type, profile, command, agent, Run, Artifact, and PublishPackage registries and contracts.
Track production stages and artifacts in 00_state/runs without changing existing media paths.
changes.rollbackImpact: run records can remain as historical evidence

changes.summary: Adopt completed Stable artifacts into a 3.0 Canary metadata package without re-encoding or modifying media.
Require deterministic Canary checks and explicit user confirmation before activation.
Separate read-only Daily Engineering Loop ownership from Release and Canary write operations.
changes.rollbackImpact: release commands remain callable through vp

changes.summary: After 3.x activation, finalize each publish-ready package into native Stable Run State; remain dormant on 2.x.
Initialize every required ignored local workspace directory and seed file, then expose one ordered AI context entry after a clean clone.
Keep public defaults in Git while personal speaking style and vocabulary remain optional local overrides.
Keep one Cover Skill and expose only design, make, and history actions for Pencil style versions and daily cover production.
changes.rollbackImpact: existing low-level cover commands remain available
